Poetry Panel: Nest Eggs
from a Child's Garden of Verses
by Robert Louis Stevenson
raw.name: A walk with Robert Louis Stevenson

raw.inscription:
A people of whose line was Patrick born,
Whose record Wallace, Knox and Watt adorn
Whose patriots, heroes, martyrs, true and bold
On fairest page of history are enrolled
(etc..)
raw.name: Covenanters

q: Scottish Norwegian Training Areas Memorial Edinburgh

raw.inscription:
During the war years 1940 - 45
the norwegian brigade and other army units
were raised and trained in scotland
here we found hospitality, friendship
and hope during dark years of exile
in grateful memory of our friends and allies...
raw.name: Scottish Norwegian Training Areas Memorial
